nodes.name: 人类活动扰动
nodes.summary: 旅游、施工和高频活动影响繁殖或觅食。

nodes.name: Chirinda Forest Botanical Reserve
nodes.summary: Chirinda Forest Botanical Reserve是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括Swynnerton's robin，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: NT
nodes.summary: NT表示 IUCN 近危等级，当前关联914种鸟类，如帝企鹅、小斑几维鸟、大美洲鸵等914种鸟类。

nodes.name: Swynnerton's robin
nodes.summary: Swynnerton's robin（Swynnerton's robin，学名 Swynnertonia swynnertoni），在图谱中标记为近危（NT）物种，已关联1个分布地点节点，常见栖息地包括山地森林，主要威胁包括人类活动扰动。

nodes.name: 山地森林
nodes.summary: 以成熟阔叶林和混交林为主的山地森林系统。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: In Zimbabwe this species is known to occur at the Chirinda Forest Botanical Reserve and a few small forested areas along the border with Mozambique. links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: In Zimbabwe this species is known to occur at the Chirinda Forest Botanical Reserve and a few small forested areas along the border with Mozambique. links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: Threats identified include forest clearance and disturbance and non-native invasive species, especially the ginger Hedychium
